Global Reach

Features that give you superpowers

Everything you need to build, share, and analyze forms without writing a single line of code.

AI Generation

Describe your form in plain English and watch AI build it instantly.

Drag & Drop Builder

Intuitive interface to customize every aspect of your form with ease.

Analytics & Insights

Real-time data visualization to understand your audience better.

Share Anywhere

Embed on your site or share via direct link. Works on all devices.

Enterprise Security

Bank-grade encryption and GDPR compliance out of the box.

Team Collaboration

Invite your team to collaborate on creating and managing forms.

How It Works

Build complex forms in three simple steps.

01
01

Describe

Tell our AI exactly what you need. Be as specific as you want.

Learn More
02
02

Customize

Use the robust drag & drop editor to tweak every detail.

Learn More
03
03

Publish

Get a sharable link and start collecting responses instantly.
